name: Ostension: From Dusk to Dawn
overview: Not long after moving downtown, Cora and her family face a series of hardships, while her friends Estelle and Elian each encounter unfathomable supernatural events. They begin to suspect that the tech monopoly Solarian or perhaps a higher power lies behind the tragedies, but getting closer to the source comes with consequences.
